arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo reveals Liverpool fashion secrets and how he's 'way more chill'
arts.sum: Liverpool star Cody Gakpo says he's "way more chill" than his teammates when it comes to arriving at the training ground in style - but admits he does have a strong interest in the fashion industry. The Anfield club have proven that they are some of the best dressed in the game, projecting their personal styles and embracing their unique designs.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool make the trip to Germany to face RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Wednesday evening. The Reds have attained maximum points thus far in the competition, whilst their opponents are yet to get off the mark after two tough defeats.
